description: Starter Ralph backlog seeded from IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md on 2026-03-21. Stories may be decomposed into smaller executable slices before implementation.

userStories.title: Native launcher and platform host reconstruction
userStories.description: Close the largest remaining parity gap around the retail quakelive_steam.exe host stack. Prefer a smallest vertical slice that improves real platform or menu behavior without requiring the full browser runtime.
acceptanceCriteria: Either the story is decomposed into smaller executable slices in .codex/ralph/prd.json or one evidence-backed vertical slice is implemented
Any behavior claim cites committed reference evidence from the retail host binary
.codex/ralph/progress.txt records the work performed and a before/after parity estimate
userStories.notes: Start from the owning retail binary and use metadata.txt, imports.txt, exports.txt, functions.csv, and HLIL before deciding where to land code.

userStories.title: UI and menu compatibility remediation
userStories.description: Improve engine-side tolerance for missing retail UI assets and compatibility warnings without editing the read-only src/ui tree. Distinguish hard parity blockers from harmless warnings.
acceptanceCriteria: Either the story is decomposed into smaller executable slices in .codex/ralph/prd.json or one engine-side compatibility improvement lands outside src/ui
Runtime-visible warning or asset behavior is documented with observed facts separated from inference
.codex/ralph/progress.txt records the work performed and a before/after parity estimate
userStories.notes: src/ui is read-only. Fixes must land in engine-side compatibility code, supporting docs, or validation harnesses.

userStories.title: Ownerdraw and stat payload completion
userStories.description: Finish the remaining ownerdraw and scorestats payload details, then refresh targeted fixtures so the runtime and tests stay aligned with retail expectations.
acceptanceCriteria: Either the story is decomposed into smaller executable slices in .codex/ralph/prd.json or one residual payload gap is closed with matching test or fixture updates
Targeted validation is run and logged
.codex/ralph/progress.txt records the work performed and a before/after parity estimate
userStories.notes: Prefer small, test-backed slices over broad payload rewrites.

userStories.title: Gameplay validation sweep
userStories.description: Run targeted Race and gametype validation after gameplay-side changes, capture concrete regressions, and land focused test coverage instead of relying on broad manual inspection.
acceptanceCriteria: Either the story is decomposed into smaller executable slices in .codex/ralph/prd.json or one focused validation gap is closed with updated documentation or tests
Validation evidence names the exact mode, command, or fixture used
.codex/ralph/progress.txt records the work performed and a before/after parity estimate
userStories.notes: If you uncover a regression, prefer a narrowly scoped test or harness update over a broad gameplay rewrite.
